raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging immediate self-understanding of cosmic order, divine origin, and mortality",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a divine Lord/Governor exists as source of the self",
    "human life has a fixed, non-renewable time limit",
    "failure to calm inner 'distempers' wastes that time permanently",
    "knowledge of world and governor is both attainable and urgently needed"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a unified call linking ontology, theology, and ethics via the premise of finite time",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient accepts (or is open to) a theistic cosmology and values introspective calm over other priorities",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no divine governor exists, time is not meaningfully limited in the claimed way, or the recommended understanding produces inaction or error"
}
